query: SELECT ac.assessmentPdiId, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome, COUNT(*) as numComps FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id WHERE ap.alunoId = 30082 GROUP BY ac.assessmentPdiId, ap.trilhaId, t.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ac.assessmentPdiId, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome, COUNT(*) as numComps FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id WHERE ap.alunoId = 30082 GROUP BY ac.assessmentPdiId, ap.trilhaId, t.name;
